summary: Iteration 9 complete: validated all 4 new backend endpoints (supervisor-challenge, analytics CSV export, wall-of-fame) and 5 new frontend touchpoints (toggle-sound-btn with localStorage persist, supervisor-challenge-banner on Map + Collection, trainer-card on Collection, export-csv-btn, wall-of-fame grid). All 6 pytest backend tests passed; all targeted frontend selectors found and worked.
verified_features: GET /api/supervisor-challenge returns full shape {week_start, supervisors[], caught, total, complete}; total=3 (JonG/Litwack/Mark featured); each supervisor has pokemon_id/name/rarity/image_data_url/caught_this_week.

After camper successfully POST /api/spawn/catch on a featured spawn_id, GET /api/supervisor-challenge shows caught_this_week=true for that pokemon and caught counter increments by 1 (verified end-to-end against live spawns).

GET /api/admin/analytics/export returns 200, Content-Type: text/csv, Content-Disposition: attachment; first line exactly matches the 8-column header. 151 data rows downloaded successfully via Playwright page.expect_download().

GET /api/admin/analytics/wall-of-fame returns {pokemon: [...]} with one entry per featured pokemon (3), each with total_catches/unique_catchers/first_caught_at/last_caught_at/image_data_url; sorted by total_catches desc verified.
Both export and wall-of-fame endpoints return 401 without admin auth.
MapPage: data-testid='toggle-sound-btn' exists; first click sets localStorage.rrdc_sounds_off='1', second click removes it (icon toggle verified via state change).
MapPage: data-testid='supervisor-challenge-banner' renders at top of map showing 'CATCH THE SUPERVISORS', '1/3 this week', 33% bar, and 3 supervisor avatars (1 vibrant + 2 grayscale).
CollectionPage: data-testid='trainer-card' renders camper avatar with 'Colton Ahern · Group B01 · 2 unique · 2 total'. data-testid='supervisor-challenge-banner' also renders here with same progress.

Admin → Analytics: data-testid='export-csv-btn' triggers a real CSV file download named rrdc_catches_<YYYY-MM-DD>.csv. data-testid='wall-of-fame' renders a 3-card grid; each card has data-testid='wof-card-<pid>' and Caught/Campers stats, Last caught date, RarityBadge.

WebAudio hook (window.__oscCount) installed before page navigation confirmed AudioContext.createOscillator pathway is available; existing spawns don't replay tryPlaySpawn (correct — only NEW spawns do).
critical_code_review_comments: AnalyticsTab.jsx: when wall-of-fame fetch is still pending and data is loaded, the wof grid shows the empty-state copy 'No featured Pokemon yet'. A brief flicker is possible. Consider a separate loading state for `wof===null` vs empty array. Minor UX nit.
server.py /admin/analytics/export streams entire collection into memory via StringIO; fine at current scale (151 rows) but for large camps consider StreamingResponse with async generator.
SupervisorChallenge.jsx: on err it returns null silently. Acceptable for a non-blocking banner, but a single console.warn would help future debugging.

/api/supervisor-challenge: the 'caught_this_week' check uses `caught_at >= week_start` but caught_at is stored as ISO string — string comparison happens to work because ISO 8601 is lexicographic. Still, switching to proper datetime comparison would be more defensive.
test_credentials: Admin admin/Camp1993; Camper login via /api/groups → /api/groups/<code>/campers → POST /api/camper/login {camper_id}. Used Colton Ahern (b9d35aaf-90f9-5c06-8674-3f60999d1846, B01).
seed_data_creation: Used existing 151 catches and 3 featured pokemon. The catch increment test caught one additional featured pokemon if RNG allowed, otherwise auto-skipped.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9.py. Iteration 9 endpoints all live and stable: /api/supervisor-challenge (camper auth), /api/admin/analytics/export (CSV), /api/admin/analytics/wall-of-fame. Frontend testids added: toggle-sound-btn, supervisor-challenge-banner, trainer-card, export-csv-btn, wall-of-fame, wof-card-<pid>. Legendary-alert-banner was NOT explicitly tested (would have required temporarily flipping rarity_weights which would pollute other group_spawns); the banner is wired in MapPage and the underlying tryPlayLegendary helper exists. WebAudio hook pattern: page.add_init_script wrapping AudioContext.prototype.createOscillator works to count plays.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Note: first admin analytics tab load returned null for export-csv-btn until data was fetched (early-return loading state). Adding wait_for_selector with timeout solved it cleanly.
